subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the firm Cord and manifest Light! When from the Dayspring of the Most Exalted Summit its radiance shone forth, it illumined the horizons of hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بالحبل المتین نور مبین چون از مطلع علیین اشراق نمود آفاق افئده
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution
